quizQuestion:
あなたは、スミス氏と連絡を取り{___}べきです。
(You should keep in touch with Mr. Smith.)
pedagogicalNote: 切る = completely/to the end; 続ける = keep doing; 出す(1728) = suddenly begin; 出す(1662) = begin (same); 合う = do together/mutually; 直す = do again/redo; 出す(1626) = pay/issue/stick out (different meaning)

quizQuestion:
とても寒いけれど、彼女はコート{___}で出かけました。
(Although it is very cold, she went out without a coat on)
pedagogicalNote: ずに = without doing (literary/formal negative gerund); なし = without (noun modifier); なくてもすむ = don't need to / can get by without
